description: User invokes /list-teams. No teams directory exists and index.json has no pools.
assertion: no teams exist; index.json pools array is empty

description: Output rendered: empty lists for both standing pools and non-standing teams. Friendly empty_message shown with hint.

state.empty_message: No active teams found. Use /start-review-team to create a standing review pool or /next-priority to start a session.

assertion: standing_pools is empty array; empty_message is non-empty string containing 'start' hint
